title: Hody Sets the Execution
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, King Neptune, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is hody sets the execution.
scene: The scene follows hody sets the execution, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, King Neptune, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Fish-Man Island - Sweet Factory town

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Good. Next...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Good. Next...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Good. Next...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we don't do it, we could be killed... there's no other way!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: I know Queen Otohime will forgive us....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You pass!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Next!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kyakyah!! This is pretty boring. They're barely resisting at all! I guess Otonime's dignity wasn't worth much after all!! Kyakyah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hey! Captain hordy's broadcast has started!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Sweet factory town

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: people of fish-man island and the ryluguu kingdom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I have something to tell you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So he's the one behind all this....!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: That's the same man who shot queen Otohime's assassin...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The former soldier ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: this country ...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ...will be destroyed!!! and then, it will be reborn...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I am...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...your new King!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: coral Hill

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He's trying to usurp the throne?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Where is that guy broadcasting from?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What happened to the King ....?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What happened to the straw hat pirates?! Didn't they take over the palace?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What's Happening to this country?!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Anyone who desires peace with the humans ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...should leave this country at once!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Soon, new citizens will arrive in this country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...from the fish-man district ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: comrades who share in our hatred of the humans...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and who wish to bring change to this island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What?! "New Citizens "...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: th... those outlaws are all going...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...to live here on the island ....?!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: I know that most of you witnessed the death of our beloved queen otohime!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: If we believe in the humans, and attempt to approach them with open arms ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...they will only betray us as they betrayed her!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Why can you fools not see that?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: that fiend....!!

summary: Hody Sets the Execution. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
